title: Red Crosshair
description: Just Makes the crosshair red With a different shape
body:
Just a Red crosshair with a different shape
you want to use this because it is red
and not the boring old white one
use it for amazing gameplay
[Use Low Brightness In Game For Best Result!]
[How to use]
1 Open minecraft
2 go to options
3 click resource pack
4 click open file folder
5 drag and drop the .zip file or enable it through minecraft
